name: Acqua Panna Still Mineral Water 1L
description: The Acqua Panna Still Mineral Water 1L is a testament to purity and elegance, sourced directly from the sun-drenched hills of Tuscany. This renowned mineral water is not just a refreshment but a slice of Italian heritage, celebrated for its smoothness and balanced mineral content. Key Features: Type: Still Mineral Water Volume: 1L Region: Tuscany, Italy Every sip of Acqua Panna Still Mineral Water 1L offers a soft, velvety texture that complements fine dining or can be enjoyed as a daily luxury. Its unique mineral balance and absence of carbonation make it a perfect palate cleanser, enhancing the flavours of any meal without overwhelming them. The source of Acqua Panna has been appreciated since the Renaissance, and its quality is maintained with the same dedication to tradition and purity today. Enhance your dining experience or refresh your home bar with the Acqua Panna Still Mineral Water 1L.
